notes: The decision brief lists all five sealed storage-dependent items and compares SharePoint/OneDrive versus object storage.
The actual storage choice is not synthesized because MAT-DEC-03 is an owner architecture decision.
The RP22/RP23 deadline anchor has already passed; this is preserved as a blocker rather than retroactively rewritten.

tuw_evidence.title: Propagate MAT-DEC-03 decision and judge scope revision need
tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: LT-PRE-W03-T02 depends on the MAT-DEC-03 storage decision. Without that decision, Codex cannot identify the unseal path or scope revision outcome.

blocked_claims: This record does not decide MAT-DEC-03.
This record does not unseal M365 storage-dependent items.
This record does not add units or approve a scope revision.
This record does not rewrite closed CP evidence.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.

next_required_action.owner_role: Launch owner / document storage architecture approver
next_required_action.decision_needed: Choose SharePoint/OneDrive original storage or object storage for document originals, with basis and date.
evidence_to_add_after_decision: Scope revision judgment after the chosen storage path is known
